summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of CFB Analytics scrollytelling site completed. All 14 test features passed successfully. Site loads correctly, all sections render with proper data-testid attributes, charts display data correctly, and no console errors found.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
IntersectionObserver hooks properly implemented for scroll animations
D3 charts render correctly with proper data binding
test_credentials: No authentication required - public read-only site
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. Site is a scrollytelling data visualization with D3 charts, Framer Motion animations, and IntersectionObserver-based scroll triggers. No backend - data is statically bundled.

hero_section.details: Hero section renders with data-testid='hero-section', CTA 'Start the Story' button present with data-testid='hero-cta-start', stats row shows 3,904 player-seasons, 68 teams, 2021-23 seasons, QB/RB/TE/WR positions

navigation.details: All 11 nav links present and functional: nav-link-hero, nav-link-overview, nav-link-cleaning, nav-link-design, nav-link-q1 through nav-link-q6, nav-link-conclusion

overview_section.details: Overview section renders with 3 concept cards (usage-concept-0, -1, -2)

cleaning_section.details: Cleaning section renders with funnel (cleaning-funnel) showing row counts: 12,987 → 9,850 → 5,420 → 4,210 → 3,904. All 6 decision cards present (cleaning-decision-0 through -5)

viz_design_section.details: Design section renders with 6 design notes (design-note-0 through -5)

q1_section.details: Q1 section renders with q1-top-bars (Will Rogers at top), q1-position-avg, q1-histogram, q1-trend-line

q2_section.details: Q2 section renders with q2-most-dependent, q2-most-balanced, q2-top3-ranking

q3_section.details: Q3 section renders with q3-conf-top, q3-conf-top3, q3-heatmap. Heatmap shows numeric % values (26.8%, 10.8%, 5.0%, etc.)

q4_section.details: Q4 section renders with q4-histogram, q4-avg-usage, q4-avg-share, and all 4 position cards (q4-position-card-QB, -RB, -WR, -TE)

q5_section.details: Q5 section renders with q5-scatter-top (196 dots) and q5-scatter-top3 (196 dots). No console errors.

q6_section.details: Q6 section renders with q6-archetypes scatter (196 dots) and 4 archetype cards: q6-archetype-star-driven-winners, q6-archetype-balanced-winners, q6-archetype-concentrated-strugglers, q6-archetype-balanced-strugglers

conclusion_section.details: Conclusion section renders with 5 takeaway cards (takeaway-01 through -05)

scroll_animations.details: IntersectionObserver-based animations working via useInView hook in /app/frontend/src/lib/hooks.js

console_errors.details: No red/404 errors, no React warnings about keys or invalid DOM nesting
